name: chill-out-npm-example
description: An example npm project that chill-out can audit. Some declared deps land inside the cooldown window so the demo can show how the violations get resolved.

chill-out._comment: Same windows as .chill-out.yaml; included here so you can see the package.json form too. The yaml file wins because it sits higher in the layering, but both schemas are interchangeable.
